import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

# Tile and color constants
FLOOR = 1
PYRAMID = 5
GOAL = 6
EMPTY_TILE = 0

YELLOW = 5
GREEN = 2

DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [0, -1]], dtype=jnp.int32)


def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Find yellow pyramid on grid
    yp_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yp_count = jnp.sum(yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yp_y = jnp.sum(yy * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0)
    yp_x = jnp.sum(xx * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0)
    yp_on_grid = (yp_count > 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Find green square on grid
    gs_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 4) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gs_count = jnp.sum(gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    gs_y = jnp.sum(yy * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)
    gs_x = jnp.sum(xx * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)

    # Agent info
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_dir = state.agent.direction.astype(jnp.float32)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    # Pocket info
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_yp = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Normalized positions
    norm_agent_y = agent_y / jnp.maximum(H_f - 1, 1.0)
    norm_agent_x = agent_x / jnp.maximum(W_f - 1, 1.0)
    norm_yp_y = yp_y / jnp.maximum(H_f - 1, 1.0)
    norm_yp_x = yp_x / jnp.maximum(W_f - 1, 1.0)
    norm_gs_y = gs_y / jnp.maximum(H_f - 1, 1.0)
    norm_gs_x = gs_x / jnp.maximum(W_f - 1, 1.0)

    # Relative vectors (agent -> yellow pyramid)
    rel_yp_y = (yp_y - agent_y) / jnp.maximum(H_f, 1.0)
    rel_yp_x = (yp_x - agent_x) / jnp.maximum(W_f, 1.0)

    # Relative vectors (agent -> green square)
    rel_gs_y = (gs_y - agent_y) / jnp.maximum(H_f, 1.0)
    rel_gs_x = (gs_x - agent_x) / jnp.maximum(W_f, 1.0)

    # Relative vectors (yellow pyramid -> green square)
    rel_yp_to_gs_y = (gs_y - yp_y) / jnp.maximum(H_f, 1.0)
    rel_yp_to_gs_x = (gs_x - yp_x) / jnp.maximum(W_f, 1.0)

    # Manhattan distances
    dist_agent_yp = (jnp.abs(agent_y - yp_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yp_x)) / (H_f + W_f)
    dist_agent_gs = (jnp.abs(agent_y - gs_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - gs_x)) / (H_f + W_f)
    dist_yp_gs = (jnp.abs(yp_y - gs_y) + jnp.abs(yp_x - gs_x)) / (H_f + W_f)

    # Front tile info
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0

    # Is yellow pyramid adjacent to green square (task completion check)
    # Check all 4 neighbors of green square
    adj_offsets = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]], dtype=jnp.int32)
    def check_adj(offset):
        ny = jnp.clip((gs_y + offset[0]).astype(jnp.int32), 0, H - 1)
        nx = jnp.clip((gs_x + offset[1]).astype(jnp.int32), 0, W - 1)
        is_yp = (state.grid[ny, nx, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[ny, nx, 1] == YELLOW)
        return is_yp.astype(jnp.float32)
    adj_check = jax.vmap(check_adj)(adj_offsets)
    yp_adjacent_gs = jnp.any(adj_check > 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 80.0

    obs = jnp.array([
        norm_agent_y, norm_agent_x,
        dir_oh[0], dir_oh[1], dir_oh[2], dir_oh[3],
        holding_yp, pocket_empty,
        pocket_tile / 12.0, pocket_color / 11.0,
        norm_yp_y, norm_yp_x, yp_on_grid,
        norm_gs_y, norm_gs_x,
        rel_yp_y, rel_yp_x,
        rel_gs_y, rel_gs_x,
        rel_yp_to_gs_y, rel_yp_to_gs_x,
        dist_agent_yp, dist_agent_gs, dist_yp_gs,
        front_tile_id, front_tile_color,
        yp_adjacent_gs,
        step_norm,
    ], dtype=jnp.float32)

    return obs


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Find green square position
    gs_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == 4) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gs_count = jnp.sum(gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    gs_y = jnp.sum(yy * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)
    gs_x = jnp.sum(xx * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)

    # Find yellow pyramid on grid (next state)
    yp_mask_next = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yp_count_next = jnp.sum(yp_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32)
    yp_y_next = jnp.sum(yy * yp_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count_next, 1.0)
    yp_x_next = jnp.sum(xx * yp_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count_next, 1.0)

    # Find yellow pyramid on grid (current state)
    yp_mask_cur = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yp_count_cur = jnp.sum(yp_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32)
    yp_y_cur = jnp.sum(yy * yp_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count_cur, 1.0)
    yp_x_cur = jnp.sum(xx * yp_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count_cur, 1.0)

    # Agent positions
    agent_y_cur = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_cur = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_y_next = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_next = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # Holding yellow pyramid
    holding_yp_cur = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_yp_next = ((next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Check if yellow pyramid is adjacent to green square (task success)
    adj_offsets = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]], dtype=jnp.int32)
    gs_y_int = gs_y.astype(jnp.int32)
    gs_x_int = gs_x.astype(jnp.int32)

    def check_adj_next(offset):
        ny = jnp.clip(gs_y_int + offset[0], 0, H - 1)
        nx = jnp.clip(gs_x_int + offset[1], 0, W - 1)
        is_yp = (next_state.grid[ny, nx, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[ny, nx, 1] == YELLOW)
        return is_yp.astype(jnp.float32)

    def check_adj_cur(offset):
        ny = jnp.clip(gs_y_int + offset[0], 0, H - 1)
        nx = jnp.clip(gs_x_int + offset[1], 0, W - 1)
        is_yp = (state.grid[ny, nx, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[ny, nx, 1] == YELLOW)
        return is_yp.astype(jnp.float32)

    adj_next = jax.vmap(check_adj_next)(adj_offsets)
    adj_cur = jax.vmap(check_adj_cur)(adj_offsets)

    yp_adj_gs_next = jnp.any(adj_next > 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    yp_adj_gs_cur = jnp.any(adj_cur > 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # === Reward components ===

    # 1. Big reward for task completion
    task_complete = yp_adj_gs_next * (1.0 - yp_adj_gs_cur)
    reward_complete = task_complete * 10.0

    # 2. Reward for picking up the yellow pyramid
    picked_up_yp = holding_yp_next * (1.0 - holding_yp_cur)
    reward_pickup = picked_up_yp * 2.0

    # 3. Dense shaping: when NOT holding pyramid, reward moving closer to it
    dist_agent_to_yp_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - yp_y_cur) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - yp_x_cur)
    dist_agent_to_yp_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - yp_y_next) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - yp_x_next)
    # Use yp position from current state for both (pyramid hasn't moved unless picked up)
    dist_agent_to_yp_next_v2 = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - yp_y_cur) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - yp_x_cur)
    approach_yp = (dist_agent_to_yp_cur - dist_agent_to_yp_next_v2) / (H_f + W_f)
    reward_approach_yp = approach_yp * 0.3 * (1.0 - holding_yp_cur)

    # 4. Dense shaping: when holding pyramid, reward moving closer to green square
    dist_agent_to_gs_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - gs_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - gs_x)
    dist_agent_to_gs_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - gs_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - gs_x)
    approach_gs = (dist_agent_to_gs_cur - dist_agent_to_gs_next) / (H_f + W_f)
    reward_approach_gs = approach_gs * 0.3 * holding_yp_cur

    # 5. Reward for placing pyramid closer to green square
    dist_yp_to_gs_cur = jnp.abs(yp_y_cur - gs_y) + jnp.abs(yp_x_cur - gs_x)
    dist_yp_to_gs_next = jnp.abs(yp_y_next - gs_y) + jnp.abs(yp_x_next - gs_x)
    # Only meaningful when pyramid is placed (not held)
    placed_yp = (1.0 - holding_yp_next) * (yp_count_next > 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    improve_yp_gs = (dist_yp_to_gs_cur - dist_yp_to_gs_next) / (H_f + W_f)
    reward_yp_placement = improve_yp_gs * 0.5 * placed_yp

    total_reward = (reward_complete + reward_pickup +
                    reward_approach_yp + reward_approach_gs +
                    reward_yp_placement)

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
